content: Standard Laravel pattern for gating a view on a status-column transition (e.g. submitted vs graded) is a plain conditional in the controller/policy comparing the enum-cast or string status column, not a package or state-machine — consistent with this project's existing choice (STACK.md) to skip a state-machine package for the 3-state attempt lifecycle. No package needed; branch in the controller (redirect to an 'awaiting grading' view) or in the Blade view itself.
